description.content:

 **Token scopes**: `people:write`

header.description:
(Required) ## Authentication
The Deel API uses bearer tokens to authenticate requests. All API calls must be made over HTTPS — calls over plain HTTP or without authentication will fail.

```curl
curl -X GET 'https://api.letsdeel.com/rest/v2/contracts' \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer YOUR-TOKEN-HERE'
```

(Required) ## Authentication
The Deel API uses bearer tokens to authenticate requests. All API calls must be made over HTTPS — calls over plain HTTP or without authentication will fail.

```curl
curl -X GET 'https://api.letsdeel.com/rest/v2/contracts' \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer YOUR-TOKEN-HERE'
```

[Learn more about authentication](/api/authentication)

description.content:
Use this endpoint to retrieve resignations submitted by Employer of Record (EOR) workers. Use it when you need to review resignation progress, confirm desired and confirmed end dates, and access resignation letter details. Filter results by resignation letter status using the query parameter
 **Token scopes**: `worker:read`

header.description:
(Required) ## Authentication
The Deel API uses bearer tokens to authenticate requests. All API calls must be made over HTTPS — calls over plain HTTP or without authentication will fail.

```curl
curl -X GET 'https://api.letsdeel.com/rest/v2/contracts' \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer YOUR-TOKEN-HERE'
```

[Learn more about authentication](/api/authentication)

description.content:
This endpoint allows workers to provide their signature for a resignation letter. The signature is required to finalize the resignation process. Upon successful submission, the resignation letter is queued for PDF generation and further processing.
 **Token scopes**: `worker:write`

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier of the employee contract.

response.name: Resignation signed successfully.

description.content: (Required)
